Name: PayFit
Description: PayFit is Europe's leading cloud-based and integrated payroll and HR software. We give you the visibility and automation you need to easily manage your payroll, with the support of payroll experts. With many businesses often choosing between in-house or outsourced payroll, PayFit looks to offer a hybrid alternative. We believe that by providing the best of both -- e.g. the control and visibility of in-house and the expertise and specialism associated with outsourcing -- you can enjoy the best payroll experience possible.
